title: 🇭🇺 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga congratulated...
title_en: 🇭🇺 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga congratulated...

description: 🇭🇺 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga congratulated Peter Magyar and the TISZA party on the victory in the parliamentary elections in Hungary. 💬 "Congratulations to the Hungarian people on today's democratic, transparent and historic parliamentary elections. The record high turnout indicates a turning point for Hungary. We wish the winners, Peter Magyar and the TISZA party, success in realizing their expectations...
description_en: 🇭🇺 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga congratulated Peter Magyar and the TISZA party on the victory in the parliamentary elections in Hungary. 💬 "Congratulations to the Hungarian people on today's democratic, transparent and historic parliamentary elections. The record high turnout indicates a turning point for Hungary. We wish the winners, Peter Magyar and the TISZA party, success in realizing their expectations...
description_uk: 🇭🇺 Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга привітав Петера Мадяра та партію TISZA з перемогою на парламентських виборах в Угорщині. 💬 "Вітаємо угорський народ із сьогоднішніми демократичними, прозорими та історичними парламентськими виборами. Рекордно висока явка свідчить про переломний момент для Угорщини. Бажаємо переможцям, Петеру Мадяру та партії TISZA, успіхів у реалізації очікувань...

title: The turnout at the elections in Hungary reached a record 77.8%, the...
title_en: The turnout at the elections in Hungary reached a record 77.8%, the...
title_uk: Явка на виборах в Угорщині досягла рекордних 77,8%,...
description: The turnout at the elections in Hungary reached a record 77.8%, the voting was completed. According to the media, citizens elected 199 deputies, the final vote count is planned to be completed by April 18. At the same time, observers recorded violations, including distribution of packages to voters and suspicious delivery of people to polling stations.
description_en: The turnout at the elections in Hungary reached a record 77.8%, the voting was completed. According to the media, citizens elected 199 deputies, the final vote count is planned to be completed by April 18. At the same time, observers recorded violations, including distribution of packages to voters and suspicious delivery of people to polling stations.
description_uk: Явка на выборах в Венгрии достигла рекордных 77,8%, голосование завершено Как сообщают СМИ, граждане выбирали 199 депутатов, окончательный подсчёт голосов планируют завершить до 18 апреля. При этом наблюдатели зафиксировали нарушения, включая раздачу пакетов избирателям и подозрительную доставку людей на участки.

title: Kyiv: Update: More Hungarians cast their votes than in any previous...
title_en: Kyiv: Update: More Hungarians cast their votes than in any previous...
title_uk: Київ: Оновлення: Угорців проголосувало більше, ніж будь-коли раніше...
description: Update: More Hungarians cast their votes than in any previous parliamentary election. By 5 p.m. CEST, voter turnout nationwide had reached over 70% — already surpassing the final count of any previous parliamentary election in Hungary. The high-stakes vote could unseat Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban and his Fidesz party after 16 years in power.
description_en: Update: More Hungarians cast their votes than in any previous parliamentary election. By 5 p.m. CEST, voter turnout nationwide had reached over 70% — already surpassing the final count of any previous parliamentary election in Hungary. The high-stakes vote could unseat Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban and his Fidesz party after 16 years in power.
description_uk: Update: More Hungarians cast their votes than in any previous parliamentary election. By 5 p.m. CEST, voter turnout nationwide had reached over 70% — already surpassing the final count of any previous parliamentary election in Hungary. The high-stakes vote could unseat Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban and his Fidesz party after 16 years in power.

title: Air defense active
description: 👀 Private air defense systems have appeared in Ukraine, - DW As noted in the report, these are stationary towers with large-caliber machine guns, which civilian operators control remotely through the control center. The systems are able to recognize targets and aim automatically, the operator only confirms the opening of fire. The main goal is the interception of "shahedes", the radius of action is up to 2 km.
description_en: 👀 Private air defense systems have appeared in Ukraine, - DW As noted in the report, these are stationary towers with large-caliber machine guns, which civilian operators control remotely through the control center. The systems are able to recognize targets and aim automatically, the operator only confirms the opening of fire. The main goal is the interception of "shahedes", the radius of action is up to 2 km.
description_uk: 👀 В Украине появились частные системы ПВО, - DW Как отмечают в репортаже, речь о стационарных башнях с крупнокалиберными пулемётами, которыми гражданские операторы управляют дистанционно через центр управления. Системы способны распознавать цели и наводиться автоматически, оператор лишь подтверждает открытие огня. Основная цель - перехват "шахедов", радиус действия до 2 км.

title: Kharkiv: Casualties reported
description: Russian forces executed 4 Ukrainian POWs in Kharkiv Oblast, prosecutors say Russian troops shot dead four Ukrainian prisoners of war (POWs) on April 11 near the village of Veterynarne in Kharkiv Oblast, Ukraine’s Prosecutor General’s Office reported on April 12.
description_en: Russian forces executed 4 Ukrainian POWs in Kharkiv Oblast, prosecutors say Russian troops shot dead four Ukrainian prisoners of war (POWs) on April 11 near the village of Veterynarne in Kharkiv Oblast, Ukraine’s Prosecutor General’s Office reported on April 12.
description_uk: Russian forces executed 4 Ukrainian POWs in Kharkiv Oblast, prosecutors say Russian troops shot dead four Ukrainian prisoners of war (POWs) on April 11 near the village of Veterynarne in Kharkiv Oblast, Ukraine’s Prosecutor General’s Office reported on April 12.

Donald Trump Jr. decided to work as a campaigner for Viktor Orbán. In his address, Trump Jr. said that it is vital for Hungarians to choose "independent thinking". But the irony is that this "independence"...

description_uk: 🤡 Семейный подряд: Трамп-младший учит венгров правильно голосовать Пока в Венгрии пытаются понять, как выжить в системе, где все решено заранее, из-за океана прилетел ценный совет. Дональд Трамп-младший решил поработать агитатором у Виктора Орбана. В своем обращении Трамп-младший заявил, что венграм якобы жизненно необходимо выбрать «независимое мышление». Но ирония в том, что эта «независимость»...

title: Happy Easter! The Resurrection of Christ reminds us of the power of...
title_en: Happy Easter! The Resurrection of Christ reminds us of the power of...
title_uk: Щасливого Великодня! Воскресіння Христове нагадує нам про силу...
description: Happy Easter! The Resurrection of Christ reminds us of the power of goodness and truth, which always defeats darkness. Easter morning brings not only joy - it brings hope that evil will surely be defeated, and there will surely be light ahead. May this holiday bring warmth to every family, unite us, give strength and remind us of the value of life and mutual support. Let the light of this day...
description_en: Happy Easter! The Resurrection of Christ reminds us of the power of goodness and truth, which always defeats darkness. Easter morning brings not only joy - it brings hope that evil will surely be defeated, and there will surely be light ahead. May this holiday bring warmth to every family, unite us, give strength and remind us of the value of life and mutual support. Let the light of this day...
description_uk: Зі світлим святом Великодня! Воскресіння Христове нагадує нам про силу добра і правди, які завжди перемагають темряву. Великодній ранок приносить не тільки радість – він приносить надію, що зло неодмінно зазнає поразки, а попереду обов’язково буде світло. Нехай це свято приносить кожній родині тепло, об’єднує нас, дає силу та нагадує про цінність життя та взаємопідтримки. Хай світло цього дня...

title: Kyiv: When we were preparing this year's Easter greeting, we learned that...
title_en: Kyiv: When we were preparing this year's Easter greeting, we learned that...
title_uk: Київ: Готуючи цьогорічне пасхальне привітання, ми дізналися, що...
description: When we were preparing this year's Easter greeting, we learned that very close by, also on the territory of Sofia of Kyiv, at this very time, the children of defenders from Kyiv and the Kyiv region, whose parents, unfortunately, died in this war, gathered. An excursion, a quest with the search for Easter eggs, freckles and groves, master classes on making stained glass for special guests were prepared by the Platform of Socially Responsible Business...
description_en: When we were preparing this year's Easter greeting, we learned that very close by, also on the territory of Sofia of Kyiv, at this very time, the children of defenders from Kyiv and the Kyiv region, whose parents, unfortunately, died in this war, gathered. An excursion, a quest with the search for Easter eggs, freckles and groves, master classes on making stained glass for special guests were prepared by the Platform of Socially Responsible Business...
description_uk: Коли ми готували цьогорічне великоднє привітання, дізналися, що зовсім поряд, теж на території Софії Київської, у цей самий час зібралися діти захисників із Києва й Київщини, чиї батьки, на жаль, загинули на цій війні. Екскурсію, квест із пошуком писанок, веснянками та гаївками, майстер-класи з виготовлення вітражів для особливих гостей підготувала Платформа соціально відповідального бізнесу...

title: Shelling near civilians
description: "Dear defenders of Ukraine! For more than one and a half thousand days and nights, the entire Ukrainian people resisted the full-scale Russian onslaught. For more than one and a half thousand days and nights, the aggressor shelled Ukrainian cities and villages. Over the years, millions of Ukrainians learned to live in conditions of war and constant danger. And they learned to especially appreciate festive mornings, days and evenings. Today we celebrate Easter...
description_en: "Dear defenders of Ukraine! For more than one and a half thousand days and nights, the entire Ukrainian people resisted the full-scale Russian onslaught. For more than one and a half thousand days and nights, the aggressor shelled Ukrainian cities and villages. Over the years, millions of Ukrainians learned to live in conditions of war and constant danger. And they learned to especially appreciate festive mornings, days and evenings. Today we celebrate Easter...
description_uk: "Шановні захисники та захисниці України! Понад півтори тисячі днів і ночей весь український народ протистоїть повномасштабній російській навалі. Понад півтори тисячі днів і ночей агресор обстрілює українські міста і села. За ці роки мільйони українців навчилися жити в умовах війни та постійної небезпеки. І навчилися особливо цінувати святкові ранки, дні й вечори. Сьогодні ми відзначаємо Великдень...

title: Kyiv: Drone strike
description: Russian drone strikes ambulance in northeastern Ukraine, injuring 3 paramedics despite Easter ceasefire. A Russian drone struck an ambulance in Sumy Oblast, injuring three paramedics overnight on April 12 despite an Easter ceasefire being in place, local authorities reported.
description_en: Russian drone strikes ambulance in northeastern Ukraine, injuring 3 paramedics despite Easter ceasefire. A Russian drone struck an ambulance in Sumy Oblast, injuring three paramedics overnight on April 12 despite an Easter ceasefire being in place, local authorities reported.
description_uk: Russian drone strikes ambulance in northeastern Ukraine, injuring 3 paramedics despite Easter ceasefire. A Russian drone struck an ambulance in Sumy Oblast, injuring three paramedics overnight on April 12 despite an Easter ceasefire being in place, local authorities reported.

title: Casualties reported
description: 🤬 Katsaps killed a Ukrainian evacuation group near Gulyaipilskyi 🔄 Despite the so-called "ceasefire", the enemy continues what he was doing. Today, around 5:30 p.m. near Gulyaipilskyi, with the use of fpv drones, snipers killed a group of our wounded. 💬 Another illusion of the partners that Moscow wants peace must be shattered. Only by joint power, and not by playing along, can you make the bastards sit down for...

Only by joint power, and not by playing along, can you make the bastards sit down for...
description_uk: 🤬 Кацапи вбили українську евакуаційну групу поблизу Гуляйпільського 🔄 Незважаючи на так зване "припинення вогню", ворог продовжує те, що і робив. Сьогодні близько 17:30 поблизу Гуляйпілського, з використанням fpv-дронів кацапи вбили групу наших поранених. 💬 Чергові ілюзії партнерів, що москаль хоче миру, мають бути розбиті. Лише спільною силою, а не підіграванням, можна змусити виродків сісти за...

title: We are working with partners to move forward in negotiations and in...

On Monday, there will be a detailed report from Rustem Umerov on all agreements in the Middle East, the Gulf, and other countries...
